summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TradeLife app with Supabase integration, onboarding flows, dashboard functionality, and transaction review features

ui_bugs.issue: Button clicks but doesn't navigate to /transactions/review

ui_bugs.component: Review Page Back to Dashboard Button
ui_bugs.issue: Button clicks but doesn't navigate back to /dashboard

passed_tests: All 12 backend API endpoints (100% pass rate)
Onboarding step 1: Business type selection (Sole Trader, Limited Company, Not set up yet)
Limited Company flow: options → company search → confirm → preview → dashboard redirect
Companies House mock lookup: '12345678' → Smith Construction Ltd with address
Companies House mock lookup: 'Jones' → Jones Plumbing Services Ltd autofill
Sole Trader flow: bank usage → business name → preview with logo → confirm
Preview step shows generated logo (colored circle with first letter), company name, address
Dashboard loads with transaction data from Supabase (not localStorage)
Connect Bank functionality: classifies 4 mock transactions via /api/classify with org_id
Dashboard shows Business count=2, Personal count=3, Review count=0 after classification
Review page fetches transactions from Supabase with all 5 transactions
Business/Personal classification buttons update transactions via PATCH /api/transactions
User rules saved via POST /api/user-rules when classifying
/api/classify works with org_id and fetches user_rules from Supabase before AI fallback
No localStorage usage anywhere - all data from Supabase
Onboarding never renders blank fallback message
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix navigation issues: Review Transactions button on dashboard and Back to Dashboard button on review page are not navigating properly (buttons click but router.push() calls not working)
